# Sun Functional Movement

> Personal training studio in San Jose, CA focused on health longevity for busy professionals.

## About
Sun Functional Movement (SunFM) is a personal training business founded by Jeffrey Sun, an ACE Certified Personal Trainer with a B.S. in Human Biology from UC Santa Cruz. Based in San Jose, SunFM serves clients across the South Bay Area including Sunnyvale, Cupertino, Santa Clara, Mountain View, and Campbell — both in-person and online.

## Services
- 1-on-1 personal training (in-person and online)
- Free 1-hour consultation with movement assessment
- Custom program design with app-based progress tracking
- DEXA body composition scans
- Mobility and flexibility training
- Transition from physical therapy to training
- Hypertrophy and strength training
- Athletic performance coaching

## Key Facts
- 12,000+ training sessions delivered
- 107+ clients trained
- 7+ years of professional training experience
- 5-star rated on Google and Yelp
- Located at 1401 Parkmoor Ave, Suite 100, San Jose, CA 95126

## Contact
- Website: https://www.sunfm.fitness
- Email: jeff@sunfm.fitness
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/jeffsunfitness/
- Yelp: https://www.yelp.com/biz/sun-functional-movement-san-jose

## Tools
- [The Movement Screen](https://www.sunfm.fitness/tools/movement-screen): A free 12-question mobility self-assessment scoring shoulders, thoracic spine, hips, hamstrings, ankles, and core on a 10-point scale. Generates a personalized downloadable 1-week program built around the reader's lowest-scoring regions. No email required.

## Blog
- [Neck Pain When Sitting at a Desk: 3 Self-Checks for Desk Workers](https://www.sunfm.fitness/training/neck-pain-when-sitting-at-a-desk): Three self-checks (chin tuck endurance, cervical range of motion, wall posture test) for tech neck, plus five drills (chin tucks, levator scapulae stretch, upper trap stretch, thoracic extension over chair, suboccipital release) and red-flag criteria for when to see a doctor instead of self-treating.
- [Knee Pain When Sitting at a Desk: 3 Self-Checks for Desk Workers](https://www.sunfm.fitness/training/knee-pain-when-sitting-at-a-desk): Three self-checks (knee-to-wall ankle test, single-leg squat for knee tracking, modified Thomas hip flexor test) with pass/borderline/fail ranges to find the upstream cause of desk-worker knee pain, plus five drills (couch stretch, glute bridge march, step-down, wall sit, eccentric calf raise) and clear red-flag criteria for when to see a doctor.
- [Core Stability Test at Home: 3 Checks for Desk Workers](https://www.sunfm.fitness/training/core-stability-test-at-home): Three at-home core tests (dead bug coordination, side plank hold, bird dog hold) with pass/borderline/fail ranges, plus five drills targeting deep-core function rather than plank-hold endurance, including dead bug, hollow body, side plank, bird dog, and Pallof press.
- [Shoulder Mobility Test at Home: 3 Checks for Desk Workers](https://www.sunfm.fitness/training/shoulder-mobility-test-at-home): Three at-home shoulder tests (Apley scratch, wall flexion, prone reach) with pass/borderline/fail ranges, plus five drills covering overhead range, pec length, scapular control, posterior strength, and internal rotation.
- [Hamstring Flexibility Test at Home: Score Your Tight Hamstrings](https://www.sunfm.fitness/training/hamstring-flexibility-test-at-home): Three at-home hamstring tests (standing toe touch, active knee extension, straight leg raise) with pass/borderline/fail ranges, plus five drills covering length, strength, and sciatic nerve mobility.
- [Thoracic Spine Mobility Test at Home: 3 Checks for Desk Workers](https://www.sunfm.fitness/training/thoracic-spine-mobility-test-at-home): Three at-home tests (wall angel, seated rotation, cat-cow segmentation) with pass/borderline/fail ranges, plus five drills to loosen a stiff upper back from sitting.
- [Ankle Mobility Test at Home: Fix Tight Dorsiflexion in 10 Minutes](https://www.sunfm.fitness/training/ankle-mobility-test-at-home): Knee-to-wall self-test with pass/fail ranges in inches, five drills to fix tight dorsiflexion, and guidance on interpreting asymmetry between sides.
- [Hip Mobility Test at Home: 5-Minute Self-Check](https://www.sunfm.fitness/training/hip-mobility-test-at-home): Four at-home hip mobility tests (supine flexion, Thomas test, 90/90 rotation, butterfly depth) with pass/borderline/fail ranges and what each pattern reveals.
- [Strength Training for Longevity After 30](https://www.sunfm.fitness/training/strength-training-for-longevity-beginners-guide-over-30): Minimum effective dose (30-60 min/week) for sarcopenia prevention, five foundational movement patterns, and research on grip strength as a mortality predictor.
- [Functional Movement Exercises for Desk Workers](https://www.sunfm.fitness/training/functional-movement-exercises-for-desk-workers): 4-phase routine (mobility, activation, strength, cooldown) designed to undo 8 hours of sitting, targeting tight hip flexors, glute amnesia, and thoracic stiffness.
- [Personal Training for Stress Relief in the Bay Area](https://www.sunfm.fitness/wellness/personal-training-for-stress-relief-bay-area): Training for cortisol and burnout recovery rather than vanity; specific chronic-stress patterns seen in tech workers and how to dose exercise for nervous-system recovery.
- [Meal Prep for Busy Professionals](https://www.sunfm.fitness/nutrition/meal-prep-for-busy-professionals): A simplicity-first meal prep system (5-container approach, 20-minute grocery runs) designed for desk workers, not bodybuilders.
